title: GraphConceptInsert
description: Body schema for POST /concepts. Ratifies the post-a7u-5 contract: type lives inside data, never at envelope. Envelope-level `type` is hard-rejected (additionalProperties: false at envelope) to prevent the drift class that produced the a7u-5 bug cluster.

type.description: Concept type (snake_case). The SQLite adapter requires this field; it is the canonical location for concept type.
